prompt: Evaluate the described field condition and return the appropriate decision with supporting observations.
scenario: Closeout photos for Classified-area wiring methods show the installed work following the referenced detail. Clearances, labels, supports, and terminations shown for this element are in place, and the inspection card has no open correction note. Reference material on hand: NEC 500-516.
title: Compliance check: Classified-area wiring methods (industrial site)
